case_title: GREGORY ARTHUR RIESSEN VS. ANITA CHUGANI

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF RIESSEN, GREGORY ARTHUR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2021 - CONTINUED PER DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO APR-16-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GREGORY ARTHUR RIESSEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANITA CHUGANI IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS TELEPHONE REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE IS ALLOWED BY THE COURT. A CONTINUANCE TO SEPTEMBER 2021 IS NOT ALLOWED. DEFENDANT CAN SUBMIT A REQUEST TO APPEAR BY ZOOM. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO APPEAR BY ZOOM IS TO BE SUMITTED TO THE COURT 10 DAYS BEFORE THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF WHO IS PRESENT IN COURT REQUESTS THAT THE CONTINUANCE BY SET AS SOON AS POSSIBLE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL BY PLANTIFF **GRANTED** -NOTICE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RIESSEN, GREGORY ARTHUR AS TO DEFENDANT CHUGANI, ANITA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIESSEN, GREGORY ARTHUR
ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATE OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR.
REMARK: REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED FEB-12-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHUGANI, ANITA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-16-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-16-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF GREGORY ARTHUR RIESSEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANITA CHUGANI IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHUGANI, ANITA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-16-2021 - JUDGMENT.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHUGANI, ANITA HEARING SET FOR AUG-10-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO DEFENDANT CHUGANI, ANITA
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APRIL 16, 2021 AT 8:30 A.M. DEPT. 506. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIESSEN, GREGORY ARTHUR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHUGANI, ANITA $2,550.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,625.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ANITA CHUGANI SET FOR AUG-10-2021 IS CONTINUED TO AUG-30-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN 506.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT CHUGANI, ANITA
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) (FOR HEARING SET FOR: AUG-30-21 AT 1:30PM) FILED BY DEFENDANT CHUGANI, ANITA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

THE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF AUG-30-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR ANITA CHUGANI. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR GREGORY ARTHUR RIESSEN IS PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
